register_business_name.title: Register the business

steps.title: Choose your business structure
steps.description: Decide between Proprietorship, Partnership, LLP, or Private Limited Company. For most small businesses, Proprietorship or LLP is recommended. Each has different registration requirements and tax implications.

steps.title: Check name availability
steps.description: Visit the MCA (Ministry of Corporate Affairs) portal to check if your desired business name is available. The name must be unique and not similar to existing registered businesses.

steps.title: Gather required documents
steps.description: You'll need: PAN Card, Aadhaar Card, Address Proof (utility bill/rent agreement), passport-size photograph, and digital signature (DSC) if incorporating a company.

steps.title: Apply for DIN (Director Identification Number)
steps.description: If you're registering a company or LLP, each director/partner needs a DIN. Apply through the MCA portal using Form DIR-3. Processing typically takes 2-3 days.

steps.title: File incorporation documents
steps.description: Submit the incorporation application with MOA (Memorandum of Association) and AOA (Articles of Association). For online filing, use SPICe+ form on MCA portal. Attach all required documents digitally.

steps.title: Pay registration fees
steps.description: Pay the government fee based on your business structure and authorized capital. Fees range from ₹500 (Proprietorship) to ₹10,000+ (Private Limited). Payment is made online through the MCA portal.

steps.title: Receive Certificate of Incorporation
steps.description: After verification (typically 7-15 days), you'll receive the Certificate of Incorporation via email. Download and save this document—it's proof of your business registration.

steps.title: Apply for PAN and TAN
steps.description: Your business needs its own PAN (Permanent Account Number) and TAN (Tax Deduction Account Number). These are automatically generated with SPICe+ filing, but verify receipt.

register_business_name.expected_result: Certificate of Incorporation, Business PAN, and TAN numbers
register_business_name.what_to_save: Certificate of Incorporation (CIN), Business PAN card, TAN certificate, and approval emails from MCA

obtain_business_registration_number.title: Obtain business registration number

steps.title: Determine registration type
steps.description: For MSMEs (Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises), register for Udyam Registration. For shops and establishments, register with your state's Labour Department.

steps.title: Visit Udyam Registration portal
steps.description: The Udyam portal is the single-window system for MSME registration. It's free and can be completed online in 15-20 minutes if you have all documents ready.

steps.title: Enter Aadhaar number
steps.description: For proprietorship, enter your personal Aadhaar. For companies/LLPs, enter the authorized signatory's Aadhaar. You'll receive an OTP for verification.

steps.title: Fill business details
steps.description: Enter: Business name, PAN, address, bank account details, investment in plant & machinery, and number of employees. All fields are mandatory.

steps.title: Submit and get Udyam Number
steps.description: After submitting, you'll instantly receive a Udyam Registration Certificate with a unique 19-digit UDYAM number (e.g., UDYAM-XX-00-0000000). Download the PDF certificate.

obtain_business_registration_number.expected_result: Udyam Registration Certificate with unique registration number
obtain_business_registration_number.what_to_save: Udyam Registration Certificate (PDF), Udyam Number (19 digits)

define_business_plan.title: Define business plan

steps.title: Start with Executive Summary
steps.description: Write a 1-2 page overview of your business concept, mission, target market, competitive advantage, and financial highlights. This is written last but appears first. Keep it concise and compelling.

steps.title: Describe your business model
steps.description: Explain what problem you're solving, who your customers are, how you'll make money (revenue streams), your pricing strategy, and what makes you different from competitors.

steps.title: Conduct market analysis
steps.description: Research your target market size, demographics, trends, and growth potential. Identify your top 3-5 competitors and analyze their strengths/weaknesses.

steps.title: Define organization structure
steps.description: Outline your team structure, key roles, and responsibilities. Include founder bios highlighting relevant experience.

steps.title: Detail your products/services
steps.description: Describe what you're selling in detail—features, benefits, development stage, and future roadmap. Include photos or mockups if available.

steps.title: Create marketing & sales strategy
steps.description: How will you acquire customers? Define your channels, marketing budget, customer acquisition cost, and sales process.

steps.title: Develop financial projections
steps.description: Create 3-year projections including Income Statement, Cash Flow, and Balance Sheet. Calculate break-even point and funding requirements.

define_business_plan.expected_result: A comprehensive business plan ready for investors or banks
define_business_plan.what_to_save: Final business plan PDF, financial projection spreadsheets
